experiment: DOMEX-NK-S458: Frontier-closure classifier + M4 resolution-intent measurement
expect: Frontier-closure analysis identifies >=3 closeable frontiers from 15 active; M4 resolution-intent measurable as distinct mechanism

results.blocked_external: 33% (5/15) require external dependencies — permanently open without external action

actual: 3 CLOSEABLE identified (F-DEP1, F-META8, F-ISO2). 2 resolved via M4 this session (F-META8 RESOLVED, F-DEP1 PARTIALLY RESOLVED). M4 14.3x closure multiplier vs organic. Classifier discriminates: mean CLOSEABLE 9.0 vs mean BLOCKED 3.6 (gap 5.4).
diff: Both predictions CONFIRMED. Novel: 33% permanently blocked by external deps — suggests frontier hygiene (reframe or absorb). M4 is the critical missing mechanism — without explicit closure-intent, frontiers accumulate.
